title: Fix Media Manager Thumbnail Display

requirements.text: Replace generic car icon thumbnails in Media Manager with actual image thumbnails. In the MediaAssetGrid component (frontend/src/components/admin/MediaAssetGrid.tsx), fetch and display the actual uploaded images using their blob IDs instead of showing placeholder icons.

quotes: Ok, fokus perbaikan thumbnail di media manajer dulu

acceptanceCriteria: Media Manager grid displays actual image thumbnails instead of generic car icons
Image thumbnails are loaded from blob storage using their asset IDs
Thumbnails maintain proper aspect ratio and fit within grid cells
Loading state shows skeleton while thumbnails are being fetched

requirements.text: Implement proper image URL generation for media assets. Create a utility function that generates blob URLs from asset IDs using the canister's HTTP endpoint pattern, and integrate it into MediaAssetGrid to display thumbnails.
acceptanceCriteria: Utility function correctly constructs blob URLs from asset IDs
Function handles both image and PDF asset types appropriately
URLs are properly formatted for the Internet Computer canister HTTP interface
Error handling for failed image loads shows fallback UI

constraints: Do not modify backend/main.mo, backend/migration.mo, or any Phase 1 and Phase 2 foundation files unless absolutely necessary
Do not alter frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts or frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts
Do not edit Shadcn UI component files in frontend/src/components/ui
Keep existing blob storage implementation intact
nonGoals: Fixing Website Settings page image persistence (deferred to next request)
Updating homepage banner images (deferred to next request)
Modifying upload functionality or file validation
Changing media asset data structure or backend storage
